action.reasoning: Observation: Data /data not found despite environment variable. Multiple iterations failed to locate train.pt. Need exhaustive search to find training data. Analysis: Could be in /experiments subdirectories (maybe previous experiment artifacts) or other locations. Decision: Update explore2.py to deep-search /experiments, read config.json, check home directories, run find with maxdepth to avoid timeout. After locating data, immediately update train.py path and run a 5-epoch training to get baseline and timing, then submit eval.
